MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF SERVUS MEDIA LTD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of the Law Offices of Todd F. Haines to withdraw as counsel for Servus Media LTD is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
